gist.headline: Reading the manual
gist.blurb: Updated the SDK documentation to reflect the latest account permission scopes. Because guessing API permissions is only fun for the first hour.
gist.summary: Updated the SDK README to reflect the recently merged account permission scopes.
gist.impact: Developers referencing the SDK documentation will now see the correct, up-to-date scope examples for account permissions.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot reading a manual or documentation, holding a small key representing permissions. A robot companion looking over her shoulder. Focus on documentation, reading, and permissions.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a small glowing key while reading a chunky pixelated manual. A cute robot with a CRT monitor head looks over her shoulder, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
